context: Name of the to be translated language

translation: Frumentum, saccharum, lac et ova tibi opus sunt!

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
Acquire diamonds with your iron tools
Destroy a Ghast with a fireball

translation: Pandere res alta terra et caligine mersas

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Debes esse lusor operans in modo creatiuo

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Cubi iussorum in hoc moderatro permissi non sunt

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Nota bene! Liber subscriptus mutari non poterit.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks

translation: Mittere nuntium ad locutorium non potes

source_string: Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Visne vero hanc paginam interretialem aperire?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Visne hunc ligamen aperire vel id ad latibulum copiare?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Asseri %s ad hoc nullus lusor in linea est

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Nihil mutatum est. Lusor iamiam administrator non est

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: Citimus %s est ad %s (%s cubi ab hoc)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: Citimus %s est ad %s (%s cubi ab hoc)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Nihil mutatum est. Lusor iamiam administrator est

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard

translation: Locus reincunabuli mutatur, nunc %s, %s, %s [%s] in %s pro %s est

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Selecto ulla nota non est vel nimiae notae sunt

source_string: Target does not have this tag
Failed to connect to the server
Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Aliter, haec aliqui sunt quod ante fecimus!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Visne formam tuam praefactam cum alicui communicare? Utere rectangulum inferum!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
%1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s in cactum ambulavit dum ab %2$s defugit

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block

translation: %1$s ab %2$s cum %3$s quom globo igneo conflagravit
%1$s in flammam ambulavit dum cum %2$s pugnavit

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s in lava natare conatus(a) est ut ab %2$s fugeret

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
%1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
%1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
%1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s longe cecidit et a %2$s cum %3$s peractum est

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Haec demonstratio quinque dies ludi durabit. Fac optima quae potes!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Excessisti tuum diem quintum. Utere %s ut imaginem creationis tuae serves.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Haec demonstratio quinque dies in ludo (circiter unam horam quadragintaque minutas in vita vera). Quaere incrementa in factis! Fruere!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Utere clavibus %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s et mure ut ambules

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Tempus demonstrationis terminavit. Ludum eme ut continues aut novum mundum incipe!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Visne vero difficultatem mundi firmare? Difficultas %1$s manebit, nec umquam mutari poterit.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:
The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Servitores consignationis contingeri non possunt. Iterum conare, quaeso.

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: Confirmasne te hoc moderatrum summovere velle?
